# Pull Request

## Summary
Briefly explain the purpose of this PR and the problem it solves.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Other: __________

## Related Issues / Tickets
Closes #<id> (or) Relates to #<id>

## Changes
- What changed at a high level?
- Any breaking changes? If yes, describe the impact and migration.

## Screenshots / Evidence (if UI or output)
<!-- Add before/after or logs, ensure no sensitive data -->

## How to Test
1. Steps to validate
2. Expected results
3. Edge cases covered

## Security & Privacy
- [ ] No API keys or credentials committed

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated README/docs where needed
- [ ] Examples updated

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Code compiles and lints
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Ownership & labels set
